post.title: Cursor Rules
post.content:
I already spoke about [cursor on a previous post](/blog/posts/2024-11-29-cursor), to expand on that, I saw this post on X:

Would you watch a video on how I use .mdc files to get the most out of @cursor_ai? pic.twitter.com/6Ks7hzKBrc

— Elie Steinbock — oss/acc (@elie2222) March 31, 2025
The rules he created is on [this github repository](https://github.com/elie222/inbox-zero/tree/main/.cursor/rules) # Questions?

Since I open sourced my .mdc rules for Cursor I've been getting a lot of questions.

Here are all the answers in one place:

1. Isn't 20 mdc files too much information for Cursor?
No. This is what .mdc files solve. Cursor Rules file is now deprecated. You no longer provide all… pic.twitter.com/iNEjyIx8vS

— Elie Steinbock — oss/acc (@elie2222) April 1, 2025
